message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "AppUser" as AppUser
participant "Webserver" as Webserver
participant "OrderController" as OrderController
participant "OrderService" as OrderService
participant "OrderDao" as OrderDao

AppUser -> Webserver : Get https://xxx/orders?uuid=123
activate Webserver
Webserver --x> OrderController : uuid
activate OrderController
OrderController --x> OrderService : uuid
activate OrderService
OrderService --x> OrderDao : uuid
activate OrderDao
OrderDao --x> OrderService : List<OrderPO>
deactivate OrderDao
OrderService --x> OrderController : List<OrderVO>
deactivate OrderService
OrderController --x> Webserver : List<OrderVO>
deactivate OrderController
Webserver --x> AppUser
deactivate Webserver

@enduml
```
